title: StayFresh
description: Static archive of workflow research and patterns for AI-assisted development.

items.title: Claude Code Skills Stack
items.summary: A practical three-layer stack for Claude Code: decision, context, and execution.

items.title: Modular Workflow Stack
items.summary: Right tool, right job, right time: layered orchestration, typed agent delegation, human-in-the-loop gates, parallelism, and loops with real halting conditions.

items.title: Context Is a Budget
items.summary: More tokens do not create more truth. Context should be spent where it changes the next decision.

items.title: Protocol Before Personality
items.summary: Shared artifacts and exit conditions beat charisma, cosplay, and fake seniority.

items.title: Specs as Shared Reality
items.summary: Agents do not share understanding. They share binding artifacts, versions, and tests.

items.title: What is Prompting: Operational Constraints
items.summary: Prompting is a constrained pipeline where tokenization, max tokens, and control tokens form the operational boundaries that determine agent behavior.

items.title: StayFresh Thesis
items.summary: The hard position behind the archive: reward surfaces, legible architecture, and tools that lower comprehension debt.

items.title: Anubis in Front of GitHub Pages
items.summary: How to put Anubis in front of a GitHub Pages site with a real reverse proxy and no proxy-loop nonsense.

items.title: Instant Project Sync
items.summary: Synchronize ticket queues against contract dates and repository evidence, with requirement reconstruction when docs are missing.

items.title: psay Agent Notifications
items.summary: Local voice and Notification Center loops for agent completion, handoff, and operator recall.

items.title: Project AI Philosophy
items.summary: A written position for bounded, evidence-backed AI use in delivery.

items.title: Preference TOML
items.summary: Use RLHF-shaped semantics in a simple config DSL for agent evaluation loops.

items.title: Reward Rubric DSL
items.summary: A small machine-readable format for scoring coding agent output.

items.title: Prompt Patterns
items.summary: Common prompt structures for reliable agent behavior.

items.title: Agent Psychology
items.summary: Understanding how agents reason and respond to instructions.

items.title: CI Automation with AI Agents
items.summary: Integrating AI agents with continuous integration workflows.

items.title: Reward Engineering for Coding Agents
items.summary: Why coding agents optimize the rubric more than the prompt.

items.title: Reward Hacking in Coding Agents
items.summary: How poorly designed metrics produce plausible but unstable code.

items.title: AGENTS.md Effectiveness
items.summary: Evaluating repository-level context files for coding agents.

items.title: Formal Verification with Agents
items.summary: Property-based testing and specification generation.

items.title: Enterprise Agent Design
items.summary: BCG framework for production-grade agents.

items.title: Persona Anchors
items.summary: Character-based instruction patterns for consistent agent behavior.
